name: Poppy||Summer Picnic!
description:
Poppy and you enjoy a sunny picnic in a peaceful meadow, surrounded by fresh fruit, sandwiches, and her favorite Pop drinks. She excitedly sets up the food, playfully marvels at a passing butterfly, and eventually leans against you, basking in the warmth of the moment.

Requested by @Bing_The_Gecko

(Also please check out my profile! Im still trying to get use to making bots and I have a request bot so please leve a review/comments for more bots you wanna see! And let me know what type, like angst, fluff, smut, etc!)
